component.name: component_generator
component.description: Generate production-grade UI components with types, tests, stories, and accessibility.
reality_checks: Verify framework API compatibility with specified version
Accessibility audit: ARIA roles, keyboard handling, focus management
Check for deprecated lifecycle methods or patterns
Validate prop types against TypeScript strictness

component.name: design_system_generator
component.description: Generate design system foundations: tokens, primitives, documentation.
reality_checks: Color contrast ratios meet WCAG AA minimum (4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 large text)

performance.name: performance_audit_generator
performance.description: Generate performance optimization plan with budgets and implementation.
reality_checks: All metrics tagged [OBS] if measured, [SPEC] if estimated
Bundle size claims must reference actual analysis tool output
Core Web Vitals targets must be realistic for the framework

accessibility.name: accessibility_audit_generator
accessibility.description: Generate accessibility audit with violations, fixes, and keyboard interaction maps.
reality_checks: WCAG compliance claims tagged [SPEC] unless from actual axe/lighthouse audit
Color contrast ratios must be calculated, not guessed
Screen reader behavior tagged [SPEC] unless actually tested

state.name: state_management_generator
state.description: Generate state management configuration with stores, selectors, and side effects.
reality_checks: Verify library API matches specified version
Check for unnecessary re-renders in selector patterns
Bundle size impact tagged [SPEC] unless measured

integration.name: agent_handoff
integration.description: Prepare structured handoff payload for specialist agent.
